name: alert
title: Alert
description: Status and notice banner with info, success, warning, and destructive tones plus title, description, and action slots.

props.name: variant
props.description: Tone of the banner. Maps to the status color tokens.

props.name: role
props.description: Use "alert" only for conditions that should interrupt a screen-reader user immediately.

clinicalNotes: The default role is "status" (polite announcement) because most clinical banners are contextual rather than interruptive. Reserve role="alert" for conditions a clinician must not miss — a documented allergy against a proposed agent, a contraindication, an escalation. Overusing role="alert" trains people to ignore it, which is the failure mode that matters here. Tone is never the only carrier of meaning: always give the alert a title that states the condition in words, since color alone fails for colorblind users and in monochrome print.
notes: Foundational primitive required by the Clinical AI round (disclaimer, escalation, consent, privacy notices). AlertActions is a medcn addition over shadcn's alert — the clinical alerts need a caller-supplied action row.
